M1311 (M1309) Number of Unstageble Pressure Ulcers D/T Non-removeable dressing that were present at most recent SOC/ROC This field indicates the current number of unstageable unhealed pressure ulcers due to non-removeable dressing/device that were present on admission (most recent SOC / ROC).
